name: Grilled Onion Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1 Large red onion, thinly sliced (1/4-inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the corn oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, crushed black pepper, ground cumin seeds, and salt.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Peel the large red onion and thinly slice it (1/4-inch thick). Place the onion slices in another bowl and pour the marinade over them. Allow to marinate for 1 hour.
4. After marinating, drain off any excess liquid from the onion slices.
5. Lay the onion slices on a hot grill and cook for 3 minutes per side until they are tender and lightly charred.
6. Remove the grilled onions from the heat and transfer them to a medium bowl.
7. Add the diced avocados, diced tomato, minced garlic, chopped serrano chilies, and chopped cilantro to the bowl with the grilled onions.
8. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
9. Taste the guacamole and adjust seasoning as needed with fresh lime juice if desired.
10. Keep the guacamole at room temperature until ready to serve.
